description: Style NoteMatch spring's preppy outfits with this lucera ring for an old world charm - its designed to subtly blend in and class up your ensemble. One of fine jewellery's best creations, we love that this ring doesn't steal the show, yet its delicate sculpture doesn't escape notice. We recommend wearing this with tonal jewellery, keep the bangles/bracelets to a minimum for maximum effect.Product DetailsSlim silver band with a drop shaped white centre stoneOne side of the ring connects at the centre stone top and the other at the bottomMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
